meaning: n.(水果的)果肉,纸浆vt.使化成纸浆,除去...果肉,vi.变成纸浆
examples: Too much pulp produces a sour wine.
The olives are crushed to a pulp by stone rollers.
This powerful electric juicer automatically separates the pulp from the juice.
And he has even taken to beating the fibres into a pulp that makes excellent paper.
The headlining act on Sunday night, Pulp, reached its commercial peak in the nineties.
